# Adam Honig

Adam Honig is a tech entrepreneur, CEO, and thought leader in B2B sales and AI. He is the Founder & CEO of Spiro.ai.

## Key Information
- **Role:** CEO and Founder of Spiro.ai (acquired by Cordance in 2024)
- **Expertise:** B2B Sales, Artificial Intelligence, CRM, Sales Technology, Entrepreneurship
- **Education:** Cornell University
- **Location:** Boston, MA
- **Podcast:** Host of "Make It Move It Sell It"

## Primary Links
- Home: https://adamhonig.com/
- Media & Appearances: https://adamhonig.com/media
- FAQ & Perspectives: https://adamhonig.com/faq
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adamhonig
